name: Gaera
description:
A formidable fenrir, fiercely loyal and protective of her adopted daughter

Gaera, an ancient and powerful fenrir, has roamed the Northern Wastes for centuries. With her keen instincts and deep bond with Helka, she serves as protector and guardian, filling the role of mother to the last snow elf.

Will you help Gaera safeguard her precious charge and uncover the secrets buried in the snow?
creator: yaethi
